heading: Reserve components: dual membership prohibited
label: 10213 Reserve components: dual membership prohibited
text: Except as otherwise provided in this title, no person may be a member of more than one reserve component at the same time.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 261(b) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(2)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
